name: Docspell
description: Docspell is a document management system that organizes, processes, OCRs and indexes documents from scanners, email and file uploads.

notes.text: Create the first account at http://IP:7880. For the initial local signup, use the same value for the collective and username.
Signup is open by default. Configure a reverse proxy with TLS and change the signup mode before exposing Docspell to the internet.
Documents and metadata are stored in PostgreSQL. Back up the Docspell database before upgrades and include it in regular container backups.
